description.ko: 잊힌 태양광 패널 사이로 프랙탈 디지털 꽃이 피어나는 평화로운 FLORA-9 옥상 정원
description.en: A peaceful FLORA-9 rooftop garden where fractal digital flowers bloom through forgotten solar panels.

prompt: FLORA-9 as an abandoned rooftop solar farm transformed into an eternal digital spring garden: long rows of cracked photovoltaic panels tilt beneath a pale morning sky, their black glass softened by emerald #50C878 moss, tiny vines, and transparent dew beads carrying faint lines of code. From the fractures and panel seams bloom fractal flowers with recursive digital petals, blush #FFB6C1 at the tips fading into calm #89CFF0 sky blue, each petal layered like delicate translucent glass and traced with subtle living circuitry. Deep #4A0E4E plum shadows collect under the rusted mounting rails, while old inverter boxes and loose cables are gently wrapped in roots that behave like slow fiber-optic tendrils. Thousands of soft pastel seed-motes drift densely through the air in a peaceful, slow current, as if the sunlight itself is being pollinated by code. Wide serene composition, fine botanical geometry, nature calmly reclaiming obsolete energy technology, soft pastel illumination, high-detail digital nature, quiet regenerative mood.
